customer_visible_symptom: Urgent formula order is out for delivery after the promised window, but no carrier ETA is available.
root_cause_summary: Last-mile carrier ETA synchronization is the broken promise signal. Warehouse and dispatch completed, but the carrier trace lacks driver assignment, delivery-attempt, or exception detail.
instrumentation_gap: The support agent can see out_for_delivery, but cannot see why ETA disappeared or whether the driver attempted delivery.
operational_playbook: Open courier escalation with last scan and missing ETA.
Ask carrier ops for driver assignment, attempt status, and exception reason.
Do not promise an exact time until carrier trace is updated.

spans.evidence: Last scan exists, but ETA is null after promised delivery time.

customer_visible_symptom: Order is marked delivered, but the customer says nothing arrived.
root_cause_summary: Delivery confirmation and customer receipt disagree. The useful missing layer is proof-of-delivery evidence, not a faster apology.
instrumentation_gap: Support can see delivered status, but needs proof-of-delivery trace before replacement or refund.
operational_playbook: Hold refund or replacement promise until investigation completes.

spans.evidence: No proof-of-delivery attachment exists in the synthetic trace.

customer_visible_symptom: Customer asks about card refund after collected return.
root_cause_summary: Return collection exists and card refund is still inside the policy window, so the right action is monitoring rather than escalation.
instrumentation_gap: A production system should expose refund job state and payment provider reference once refund processing starts.
operational_playbook: Send grounded waiting reply without promising faster manual refund.

spans.evidence: Card refund is still inside the synthetic 7-day window.

customer_visible_symptom: UAE return pickup is waiting beyond the expected pickup window.
root_cause_summary: Return pickup request exists, but pickup-partner scheduling has not completed within the UAE window.
instrumentation_gap: Support can see pickup_requested, but not the partner slot or failed-attempt reason.
operational_playbook: Request next available slot or failed-attempt reason.
Reschedule before sending a final customer promise.

spans.evidence: No confirmed pickup slot is present after the UAE pickup window.

customer_visible_symptom: Formula order was cancelled after payment because stock was unavailable.
root_cause_summary: Stock reservation failed before courier handoff, so recovery should focus on substitute SKU or original-method refund.
instrumentation_gap: Support can see cancellation, but not the best substitute or replenishment ETA.
operational_playbook: If none are available, route refund handling.
Avoid implying the order reached dispatch.

spans.evidence: Card payment method is present in order fixture.
Formula stock became unavailable before dispatch.
